single.stage44b2_reason_previous_fixed_cap_was_: A fixed NOT_ENTITLED prediction cap below the internal clean-dev NOT_ENTITLED gold prior can force over-SUPPORT checkpoints; Stage44-B2 compares predicted NOT_ENTITLED rate against internal gold prior plus delta instead.
single.stage44b2_recommendation: Stage44-B2 prior-aware selection is disabled because Stage44-B selection is disabled.
single.stage44b_leakage_policy: Stage44-B uses only the normal internal clean-dev split. It does not read or use Stage43-B1 external labels, metrics, examples, predictions, thresholds, calibration, checkpoint/model selection signals, loss design signals, or composer behavior changes.
single.stage44b_recommendation: Stage44-B anti-collapse selection is disabled; default checkpoint selection behavior is unchanged.
single.stage45b_leakage_policy: Stage45-B family holdout is disabled; default internal train/dev split behavior is unchanged.
single.stage45b_recommendation: Enable --stage45-use-family-holdout only for internal controlled-family robustness diagnostics.
single.stage45c_recommendation: Stage45-C is disabled for this run; no auxiliary loss terms were added and training behavior is unchanged from the pre-Stage45-C baseline.
